articles.title: AP to join hands with Google in AI and digital governance projects
articles.description: The Andhra Pradesh government formed a joint task force with Google to enhance AI, cloud computing, and digital governance, aiming to position the state as a tech hub. | India News
articles.content:
The decision was taken during a meeting between chief minister N Chandrababu Naidu and Google Asia-Pacific president Karan Bhatia in Singapore on the first day of Naidu’s two-day visit to the country.

articles.title: Singapore’s AI upskilling push: It is time to bring the frontline along
articles.description: While AI adoption is rising rapidly in Singapore, Rachel Chen of J&T Express warns that frontline employees risk being left behind without targeted upskilling.
articles.content: Singapore’s progress on AI adoption is gaining momentum. Now, nearly three in four employees are already using AI tools at work, according to IMDA’s latest Digital Economy Report, and 85% of those users say it helps them work faster and better. Consi... [7731 chars]

articles.title: Talent shortage triggers AI adoption among insurers
articles.description: A shortage of trained insurance professionals is driving insurers to automate claims processing, underwriting, and customer onboarding. This shift enables companies to handle growing business volumes with greater accuracy and efficiency, rather than replacing existing roles. Technology adoption is enhancing productivity and allowing employees to focus on higher-value client interactions.
articles.content:

articles.title: AI adoption gains momentum, returns emerge but infra lags: Industry executives
articles.description: Indian businesses are increasingly embedding AI, transforming operations and yielding measurable returns. However, legacy infrastructure, skill gaps, and a need for business model shifts pose challenges. Experts emphasise domain-specific AI applications and developing indigenous language models as India's key opportunity.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup fever fuels cyber scams
articles.description: Cybercriminals are exploiting the FIFA World Cup, creating thousands of fake ticket portals, merchandise stores, and streaming sites to scam fans. Sophisticated operations are intercepting payment details and authentication, while AI is enabling more personalized and convincing phishing campaigns.

articles.title: India shouldn’t shy away from frontier AI
articles.description: Democratisation of intelligence inside a nation’s own borders is essential for economic dynamism and societal benefit

articles.title: GitHub's AI Surge Pushes Microsoft Into Amazon's Arms
articles.description: Microsoft is adding AWS capacity to GitHub after AI-driven growth strained infrastructure and triggered a series of reliability issues.
articles.content:
Microsoft is turning to its biggest cloud rival, Amazon, to help address capacity issues on its GitHub coding platform following a series of AI-driven outages, according to two people familiar with the plans.
